Below the list of rules supported by Biome, divided by group. Here's a legend of the emojis:
- The icon <span class='inline-icon' title="This rule is recommended"></span> indicates that the rule is part of the recommended rules.
- The icon <span class='inline-icon' title="This rule has a safe fix"></span> indicates that the rule provides a code action (fix) that is **safe** to apply.
- The icon <span class='inline-icon' title="This rule has an unsafe fix"></span> indicates that the rule provides a code action (fix) that is **unsafe** to apply.
- The icon <span class='inline-icon' title="This rule is not released yet"></span> indicates that the rule has been implemented and scheduled for the next release.

## `source`

| Rule name | Description | Properties |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [useSortedKeys](/assist/actions/use-sorted-keys) | Sort the keys of a JSON object in natural order. | <span class='inline-icon' title='The rule has a safe fix.'></span> |
